### Download
- macOS DMG: attached asset (`*.dmg`)
- Checksum: attached asset (`*.dmg.sha256`)
- Direct-download alias:
  - `branai-icon-preview-lab-latest.dmg`
  - `branai-icon-preview-lab-latest.dmg.sha256`

### Verification
```bash
shasum -a 256 "Icon Preview Lab-<version>-native-arm64.dmg"
```

### Notes
- Requires macOS 13+
- If notarization/signing is enabled, this build should pass Gatekeeper checks
